# WZ-CONTRACT-MODULES-001 — Winzard module boundaries

Source: `docs/80-winzard/platform-contracts/WZ-CONTRACT-MODULES-001.md`
Hash: `sha256:8b20a96923ec03e3197f492e2f68a120de4a83e56da171be574171830c8a1faf`

## Contract

- `src/app` is a delivery adapter and does not own business logic or direct ORM access.
- Application code depends inward on domain contracts and ports.
- Infrastructure implements ports and may depend on runtime libraries.
- Composition roots wire concrete adapters and are server-only.
- Client Components do not import server-only, database, composition or infrastructure modules.

## Acceptance criteria

- `forge check` reports no architecture-boundary violations.
